arts.ttl: Levi Colwill hopes England players back up the belief of their boss Lee Carsley
arts.sum: The Chelsea centre-back says interim boss Carsley believes he has the best players in the world at his disposal.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish aims fresh dig at Gareth Southgate as he questions England decision
arts.sum: Jack Grealish was one of the headline omissions from England's Euro 2024 squad and the Manchester City star believes Gareth Southgate was wrong to overlook him

arts.ttl: Why England need to hand Cole Palmer the keys to No.10 as the Chelsea superstar shows he can become the Three Lions' chief creator, writes CRAIG HOPE
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: On the eve of the European Championship, a former player close to the England camp repeatedly told us: 'Square pegs, round holes. It won't work,' when discussing plans.

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke's honest admission on Euro 2024 snub as he makes England promise
arts.sum: Dominic Solanke refuses to suggest that being at Bournemouth counted against him when it came to England selection but he is clearly revelling in his short time at Tottenham under Ange Postecoglou

arts.ttl: England star Levi Colwill makes 'arrogant' Lee Carsley claim in glowing endorsement
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Levi Colwill, 21, won the European Under-21 Championships under Lee Carsley last year and has no doubt that the interim boss can lead England into the next World Cup

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill backs Lee Carsley 'arrogance' to help deliver success for England
arts.sum: Colwill was part of Carsley’s successful England U21 side at the Euros in 2023

arts.ttl: Palmer named England Men's Player of the Year
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Cole Palmer has been named the England Men's Player of the Year for 2024, the English Football Association announced on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Cole Palmer wins England Player of the Year award
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has officially won England Men’s Player of the Year award for the 2023-24 season. OFFICIAL: Cole Palmer wins England Player of the Year award

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal to follow in Lionel Messi & Jude Bellingham’s Adidas footsteps
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal will soon be rewarded by Adidas with his own range of signature apparel. That’s according to football insiders Footy Headlines, who have on Tuesday provided an…

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish welcomes Lee Carsley’s trust with England after Euro 2024 snub
arts.sum: Grealish was left out of Gareth Southgate’s squad for the summer showpiece.
